1809380.name: Station-Z
1809380.description:
Station-Z is a Multiplayer/Single-Player FPS zombie shooter primarily set in world war 2 era, players have to fight the endless waves of zombies infiltrating into their safe zone by achieving upgrades and keeping track of ammunition, survive to the highest wave you possibly can!

OBJECTIVE

In Station-Z players must survive the endless wave of incoming infected Soldiers (otherwise known as "zombies") from random directions infiltrating into safe zone, while also gaining points to achieve defensive/offensive upgrades and expand area to gather intel. to gain points players must kill zombies individually to progress their points meter.

SURVIVAL

in Station-Z you can only refill your ammunition for a cost of points that gradually increases throughout the waves, players have to precisely keep track of their ammunition by strictly shooting what's benefiting them in return, or else it could lead to their last breath.
1809380.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 保加利亚语, 捷克语, 丹麦语, 荷兰语, 芬兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 日语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 简体中文, 瑞典语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
